column1: Hey Bree, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi! Its the week of March 9th
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Hey bree, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sorry lol idk why those sent twice, but dope i got you punta cana is fire, I'm there every year
how many ppl in your group so far?
Is occidental caribe or riu republica a better option? And I think its about 10

honestly the Occidental Punta Cana is the best one. The caribe isnt bad but not as lit as it use to be. And the Riu def is nice but they have requirement for one person in each room to be 21 for check in
and its a little more expensive
Oh ok yeah the Riu fs wouldn't work for us
Is the occidental Punta Cana more expensive?
Ahh okay yea. honestly ill personally be on the occidental punta cana package during your week
it is a tad more expensive than the caribe, a few dollars, but ill hook you up with a discount
which school are you all from?
Ok that sounds good to me
Oh dopeeee. we have a few groups from there. i've only heard good things
heard y'all know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Yeah it's definitely a fun time here haha
where are y'all in the planning process, we lookin to get something booked soon? or just for info
Mainly just for info rn so we can figure out what the best option is before we book
I got you. I'll add the payment plan option too which allows you to reserve with a deposit and then worry about the rest of the payments later
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Yeah that payment plan option would be great
just sent lmk if it came through
I just got it thank you so much!
I will send it to my group and lyk what we plan on doing :)
for sure. I can hook it up with a discount on that occidental punta cana package. $599 for the 4 night and $729 for the 5
just lmk which one we wanna do!
Perfect! I will talk to them and get back to you!
heyy Bree whats up, how we feelin about the packages so far?
Sup! how we lookin on your end with spring break?
Hi sorry we are looking into it but it might be less people than we thought
It's all good. was about 10 before right, how many we thinkin now
heyy Bree, how many people we got in the squad now?
Hi sorry! It's looking like 5-6 now
dopee still a solid squad, do we know which package we wanted to roll with?
I think we would want to do the cheaper one but aren't ready to confirm yet
okay cool np. so the 4 night option, and still riu, or occidental punta cana?
just wanna make a note so if I see anything changing before you confirm I can give you the heads up
We are looking at the occidental cana
Loved “just wanna make a note so if I see anything changing before you confirm I can give you the heads up”
heyy Bree hope break went smoothly! How are things lookin on your end so far?
Bree whats up, just a heads up pricing is going up in two days. How is the group lookin so far?
hey checkin in, we still lookin for help getting situated for spring break?
whats up bree did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
Hi yes we got it all figured out :)
So basically our spring break plan completely fell through so now we are looking at the occidental Punta Cana again and it will be 3-4 people and we are really interested in going with you guys again
Aight cool I got you! Did we want to do 4 nights or 5
We were looking at the 4 night option
We were wondering what the cheapest dates would be too but still fun LOL
Lol I feel you. All the dates are the same price as of now. 4 nights is the way to save money. You really wanna look at what days have the cheapest flights for you
I'll help you look, which airport we wanna fly out of?
Ideally we would want tys (Knoxville) but we could drive to Nashville or atl if it's cheap enough to be worth it
Idk if that helps narrow it down or not hahaha
atl is def the cheapest. if youre cool flying spirit https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/4NmheynCWSyhUHzv7
Do you know what the cheapest one out of Knoxville would be?
tbh flights out of knoxville are kinda crazy. like 1k
Yikes is that for the whole week or just specific dates
for the week overall. I tried a bunch of dates
the cheaper ones have like 2 stops and are long layvers
I think we are good with the 384 option out of Atlanta and are good with the 4 person option for the 4 night stay
We are all good with booking but are wondering how to do it?
Okay cool yea I'll set up the reservation for the base package right now so you can each hop in and deposit
Omg will you be in Punta Cana?
Lol yea I'll be there same time as you
Wait what dates do we have LOL
Lol march 7-11 would match that atl flight
Hi Spiffy! We are interested in the booze cruise and were wondering how much it'll be
booze cruise is $79. its open bar, pretty dope vibe. ill send a video
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg this was punta cana last year too
Oooh fun ok I think we might end up doing that but I will lyk what we decide!

Hiii! 3 of my other friends are looking to go to Punta Cana with us and were wanting to book through occidental Punta Cana! I was wondering if I could send them your number so you help them out with booking :)
Yea 100%! Down to hook it up for them lol
Hi spiffy!! I was wondering if there was a party package for imagine cave, maroca, and coco bongo all in one?
yea I can hook it up with the bundle deal, its $212 for all 3 events
Oooh ok I will let everyone know and see what we choose
Bc we are still considering the booze cruise too
okay word. for your week, Coco Bongo is on the 7th, Maroca on the 9th, and Imagine on the 10th
Can we still go to the clubs and just not pay for the party pack or do we need it to get in?
the nights are like special event nights. not really spots that are open regularly on those days
coco bongo is open most days but pretty sure open bar is the only option
Oh ok so coco bongo we can still go to but the cave and imagine are only open on those specific days and we need the pass for those?
yea, you'll more than likely need a pass for coco bongo too tbh
not sure what they do for ppl that just walk up to the door. youd also have to arrange your ride there
Ok I will tell everyone and see what we pick but thank you so much!
hey could you ask Claire to put her flight info in when she can?
Yeah I will let her know rn!
She said she put it all in!
Hi Spiffy! We saw a TikTok and heard we might have to fill out a e-ticket thingy to get a temporary visa? Do you know if we actually have to do that or if we fell for propaganda
Lol. nah you actually do, I'll send you each an email this weekend with the link you don't need to do it until closer to the travel date
actually here it is but def don't gotta do it rn https://eticket.migracion.gob.do/
yo Bree! just emailed everyone the DR e-ticket link, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
I'm talking to my group today to confirm what we are doing and then I will let you know
Hi spiffy! I tried to add the coco bongo package to my account but when I went to make my payment it had me paid for the entire trip again?
Yo! Ahh I got you I'll check it out
When you went to pay what was the dollar amount it showed you?
Wait I think I figured it out hahaha
Sorry it was my blonde moment
Can you confirm that it was added to my account correctly?
Wait has everything been added and paid for the booze cruise and coco bongo on my end?
It says $-4 balance so I'm not sure how that happened
I peeped that, not sure why but I had it cleared

Ok sorry I keep annoying you about this but I'm a little confused bc I'm looking at my account and it's saying I was charged $79 twice even though the booze cruise is $75 and I was charged $79 twice on my card too
yo! looking at it now, you were charged once for the coco bongo pass for $79. and looks like yes the booze cruise came up to $79 instead of the $75 for some reason
I can adjust that and have the $4 sent back to you if you'd like!
Oh ok that makes sense, yeah sure you can send it back if it's not a problem for you! I mainly just wanted to make sure that I paid for each of them and didn't accidentally buy only one hahaha
yo! safe travels today, boutta be a fun week. see y'all out here
Hi I just got this email about the booze cruise but I paid for it and I got confirmation from you that everything was good??
hey did you stop by the hospitality desk to get your tickets when you got in yesterday?
Yeah I got the wristbands and the booze cruise ticket
I just wanted to double check and make sure
